title: Invisible Kills
description: This project makes kills in chat,  advancements, and messages appear as random enchantment table text if the player is invisible.
body:
# 🫥 Invisible Kills

**Turn stealth into true anonymity.**

Invisible Kills is a lightweight Minecraft plugin that hides a player’s identity when they strike from the shadows. Whenever a player is invisible, all traces of their actions become unreadable, appearing as random enchantment table text ```(&k)```.

## 🔧 Features:

- Obfuscates kill messages when the attacker is invisible
- Scrambles advancement/achievement messages
- Hides identity in chat-related messages
- Uses the ```&k``` magic text effect for authentic “enchantment table” gibberish

Perfect for stealth gameplay, assassin-style mechanics, or adding a mysterious edge to PvP.

**⚡ Kill unseen. Stay unknown.**
